input.system:
You are a streaming video agent. You observe 2-second video chunks and maintain memory.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

[2-4] The yellow and blue floral mandala pattern remains central, radiating from a bright white core. This angular shape frames the underlying curved design, adding a structured layer to the expanding purple radial background.

[4-6] The complex geometric pattern recedes as a small, blue-skinned figure wearing a red outfit appears in the center, sitting cross-legged in a meditative pose. Bright yellow light rays explode outward from behind the character, dominating the visual field. Faint text reading "patch paradise" is visible directly below the seated figure.

[6-8] The blue-skinned figure in red robes remains seated centrally against the bursting yellow rays. Below the character, the stylized text "patch paradise" clarifies. Large blue serif text reading "The Parable of Good or Bad" fades in underneath, followed by smaller, fainter credit text appearing at the very bottom of the screen.

[4-6] The pattern recedes; a blue-skinned figure in red sits cross-legged meditating while bright yellow rays explode outward and faint text "patch paradise" appears. [6-10] The figure remains as "patch paradise" clarifies and blue serif text "The Parable of Good or Bad" fades in. Background rays shift to muted greenish-yellow; credit text "Presented by Patchman and She-Patch" becomes fully visible. [10-12] The card fades to black, then cuts to a green landscape with a red barn where a yellow figure in a conical hat leans on a fence as a brown horse exits right and text "_ OOPS..." appears.

[12-14] A yellow figure wearing a conical hat leans on a wooden fence as a brown horse exits the frame to the right, leaving only its tail visible; the text "_ OOPS..." appears near the character's head. [14-16] A purple figure in blue overalls places a comforting hand on the yellow figure's shoulder inside a wooden doorway, accompanied by handwritten text "There There". [16-18] The purple figure withdraws their hand to rest on hips, while the yellow figure smiles broadly with arms raised outward in a welcoming gesture. [18-22] The scene shifts to a wide landscape of green rolling hills and a wooden fence where a small brown animal runs leftward along the slope near a large bush. [22-24] The yellow figure leans casually on a fence with a piece of straw in their mouth, looking past a pen labeled "New Horses" containing several brown horses. [24-28] Against a plain light blue background, the yellow figure leans on a wooden post gesturing toward the purple figure, who stands opposite with hands resting on hips.

[28-30] An orange stick figure rides a galloping grey horse with a brown mane, flailing limbs and shouting under a blue sky. [30-36] On a green hillside, a yellow figure wearing a conical hat sits on a chair opposite the orange figure, holding their leg which is encased in a brown splint. A purple figure in blue overalls stands behind them, initially raising a hand then lowering it as the seated figures open their mouths. [36-40] A procession of purple figures marches up a dirt path on a green hill, led by a figure in yellow armor and hat carrying a red flag with a black symbol. [40-42] The armored purple figure gestures to the orange figure, who now leans on a crutch, while text appears reading "Stay home and rest, you are not fit for battle". A yellow figure in a conical hat stands with crossed arms nearby near a wooden fence.

[42-46] An armored purple figure walks left away from a group containing an orange figure with a crutch and a yellow figure in a conical hat. The yellow figure waves to a distant purple figure in blue overalls on a hill, who waves back. [46-50] The scene cuts to the yellow figure against a blue background; they smile, close their eyes, and raise a hand in a gesture. [50-52] After a black screen, a light blue figure with stitches kneels in a forest opposite a pink female figure with purple hair. She places a red book labeled "Buddhist Parables" on the ground. [52-56] The blue figure reaches for the book but retracts their arm to scratch their head. The pink figure sits calmly as the book remains between them.

[56-64] In a forest with purple canopies, a kneeling light blue figure with stitches sits opposite a pink figure with purple hair. A red book labeled 'Buddhist Parables' lies on the grass between them. The blue figure touches the back of its head, crosses arms over its chest, and extends limbs outward, while the pink figure remains seated cross-legged with hands in her lap.
[64-70] The scene cuts to the light blue figure standing alone; the pink figure and book are gone. The blue figure stands with arms crossed, then extends them slightly outward. Finally, the figure lowers arms from a high raised V-shape to cross them in front of its torso.

recent_thinks: [70-72] The scene cuts to a dark blue background featuring two characters. On the left, a figure in a red coat and large feathered hat holds a ring with a blue gem. On the right, a figure in dark robes with a turban and a silver hook hand stands with a frown.

samples.output: <think>Against a dark blue background, the figure in the red coat and feathered hat smiles with closed eyes and hands on hips. The character in dark robes and a turban smiles broadly with both arms raised in the air. The ring and hook hand previously visible are gone.</think><action>silent</action>

input.system:
You are a streaming video agent. You observe 2-second video chunks and maintain memory.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).
